name: LLM annotation pipeline
description: Port llm_annotator.py from CSB. Two backends: claude-code (subprocess) and api (Anthropic SDK). Key changes: (1) remove judge scoring entirely (_build_judge_input, judge_trial, _extract_code_changes stay in CSB), (2) use importlib.resources for taxonomy YAML instead of Path(__file__), (3) replace observatory.taxonomy with agent_observatory.taxonomy, (4) raise ImportError for anthropic SDK instead of logger.error, (5) promote all functions to public API. Keep: annotate_trial_llm, annotate_batch, annotate_trial_claude_code, annotate_trial_api, annotate_batch_claude_code, annotate_batch_api, _build_prompt, _validate_categories, _truncate_trajectory, _summarise_step.
acceptance: from agent_observatory.llm_annotator import annotate_trial_llm, annotate_batch succeeds
from agent_observatory.llm_annotator import annotate_trial_claude_code, annotate_trial_api succeeds
from agent_observatory.llm_annotator import build_prompt, validate_categories, truncate_trajectory succeeds (promoted from private)
annotate_trial_llm dispatches to claude-code or api backend based on backend parameter
No judge_trial or _build_judge_input functions exist in the module
No sys.path manipulation or csb_metrics imports
Uses importlib.resources or agent_observatory.taxonomy for taxonomy YAML (no Path(__file__).parent)
anthropic import guarded with ImportError raise (not logger.error)

name: Annotation report generator
description: Port report.py from CSB. Generates Markdown reliability reports and JSON companion files from annotation documents. Key change: replace 'from observatory.taxonomy' with 'from agent_observatory.taxonomy'. Functions: generate_report(), all internal helpers.
acceptance: generate_report(annotations_dict, output_dir) returns tuple of (md_path, json_path)
Generated .md contains sections: Corpus Statistics, Category Frequency, Config Breakdown, Top Failure Categories, Success Mode Summary

name: CLI and __main__ entrypoint
description: Port cli.py and __main__.py from CSB. CLI subcommands: extract, annotate, report, llm-annotate, train, predict, ensemble, validate. All imports from agent_observatory. Remove --judge flag from llm-annotate (judge stays in CSB). Add [project.scripts] entry point in pyproject.toml: observatory = 'agent_observatory.cli:main'.
acceptance: python -m agent_observatory --help prints usage with subcommands
CLI has subcommands: extract, annotate, report, llm-annotate, train, predict, ensemble, validate
All imports use agent_observatory, not observatory

name: Export Phase 4 API and bump to v0.5.0
description: Update __init__.py to export LLM annotator and report public API. Bump version to 0.5.0 (feature-complete). Update version test.
